entity.summary: Multi-chain decentralized perpetual and spot exchange whose mainnet launch occurred in June 2023. KiloEx suffered an approximately USD 7 million oracle-manipulation exploit in April 2025, paused operations, recovered the stolen funds, and continued active on-chain trading and yield products.
entity.notes: June 1 is used as a month-level launch marker because KiloEx's official roadmap establishes a June 2023 mainnet launch but not one definitive public launch day. Existing April 2025 exploit, pause, recovery, and compensation events are not duplicated. Current first-party pages confirm active perpetual, spot, earn, and staking services.

expected.summary: Multi-chain perpetual futures decentralized exchange that suffered an approximately USD 7 million oracle-manipulation exploit in April 2025. Operations were paused and a compensation / resolution plan was later announced, so the entity is tracked as active with major incident events rather than dead.
expected.notes: Do not mark dead. Current evidence supports exploit and temporary operational suspension, followed by a compensation/resolution plan and service-resumption framing.

changes.summary: Multi-chain decentralized perpetual and spot exchange whose mainnet launch occurred in June 2023. KiloEx suffered an approximately USD 7 million oracle-manipulation exploit in April 2025, paused operations, recovered the stolen funds, and continued active on-chain trading and yield products.
changes.notes: June 1 is used as a month-level launch marker because KiloEx's official roadmap establishes a June 2023 mainnet launch but not one definitive public launch day. Existing April 2025 exploit, pause, recovery, and compensation events are not duplicated. Current first-party pages confirm active perpetual, spot, earn, and staking services.

events.title: KiloEx mainnet launched in June 2023
events.description: KiloEx's official roadmap records its contract audit and mainnet launch in June 2023 for the decentralized perpetual exchange.
events.notes: June 1 is used as a month-level marker because first-party materials establish June 2023 but not one exact launch day.

evidence.title: KiloEx Roadmap
evidence.notes: Official roadmap lists mainnet launch under June 2023.

evidence.title: KiloEx Audit History
evidence.notes: Official audit chronology corroborates the June 2023 mainnet-launch period.

evidence.title: KiloEx official trading platform
evidence.notes: Current official site confirms active perpetual, spot, earn, staking, and self-custodial trading services.
